title: Syncing Project tasks updates between boards with VLOOKUP and EXTRACT apps

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Every now and then we get inquiries about the ability to sync updates to multiple boards so I wanted to share the solution here.

  • EXTRACT app extract updates to board item (Adding to older updates or deleting the old one and add the new one)
  • VLOOKUP app takes the update from the text column and link it to multiple boards.

Here is a demo. Love to get your feedback.
